beforeAfter.heading: Watch closely
beforeAfter.subheading: One instrument. One program between ordinary and extraordinary.

identitySelector.heading: Pick a path, any path
identitySelector.subheading: Every creator arrives with a different source and a different intention. The instrument does not care. It is ready for all of them.

hardware.heading: Real hardware
hardware.subheading: Old school, industrial build quality. Just like broadcast video electronics from the 70s and 80s.

bts.heading: Built by video freaks
bts.subheading: Assembled by hand in a basement workshop in Portland, Oregon.

proof.heading: Why Videomancer?
proof.ctaBody: Pick up the instrument. We built the docs, the programs, and the community so your first session delivers.

segments.title: Live Performance
segments.body: Turn camera footage into tactile broadcast-style motion graphics live.

segments.title: Glitch & Texture
segments.body: Add hands-on glitch and color processing to HDMI sources with no laptop plugin chain.

segments.title: Format Converter
segments.body: Bridge modular video, analog formats, and HDMI from one box.

segments.title: Audio-Reactive
segments.body: Bring MIDI, CV, and audio reactivity to real video hardware in minutes.

proofCards.title: Plug in and perform
proofCards.body: Connect any HDMI, composite, or component video source. Load a program. Start creating. No software setup, no plugin chains, no laptop required.

proofCards.title: An ever-expanding library of effects
proofCards.body: From broadcast color correction to destructive glitch, every program is a new instrument. Regular firmware updates deliver fresh creative tools for free.

proofCards.title: Open source SDK
proofCards.body: Build your own video effects with the open source Videomancer SDK. Share programs, get help, and collaborate with a welcoming community of artists and engineers on Discord and GitHub.

btsImages.alt: Videomancer boxes stacked in the workshop
